item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Machinist's Journey I
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's path to becoming a realm-renowned machinist─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level machinist to 60 and complete all job quests up through “Rise of the Machinists.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
